name: Daniel Ng
description: Daniel Ng — finance, crypto, and a few obsessions: menswear, watches, cars, food, photography.
about: British born, of Singaporean and Malaysian heritage. I've built my life across three cities: London through 2024, New York from 2024 to 2026, and now San Francisco.
The throughline of everything I care about is craft, the people who pursue it, and the discipline it takes to do anything properly. This site is where I keep that.
contactText: Always open to talking about any of the above. Reach out on…
